# Source Code Generator

A practical tool that generates C# model classes from JSON input. Useful for quickly creating data models from API responses or configuration files.

## Usage

```bash
dotnet run --project SourceCodeGenerator.csproj
```

## Example

```
=== C# Source Code Generator ===

Sample JSON input:
{
    "name": "John Doe",
    "age": 30,
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "isActive": true,
    "scores": [1, 2, 3]
}

Generated C# Class:
// Auto-generated by SourceCodeGenerator
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

public class UserModel
{
    public string name { get; set; }
    public int age { get; set; }
    public string email { get; set; }
    public bool isActive { get; set; }
    public List<int> scores { get; set; }
}

✓ Class saved to: /path/to/UserModel.cs
```

## Concepts Demonstrated

- String manipulation and parsing
- File I/O operations
- StringBuilder for efficient code generation
- Type inference from JSON values
- Pattern matching with switch expressions
- Collection handling
